channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NILACHAL] Nilachal Refractories Board Meeting on May 9, 2026
item.description:
Nilachal Refractories Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 9, 2026, to consider and approve the sale/transfer/disposal of movable fixed assets, including plant and machinery, subject to shareholder approval. The board will also consider entering into related party transactions, approve the draft notice for an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM), and discuss convening the EGM on shorter notice. Additionally, the board will approve the e-voting schedule and scrutinizer appointment for the EGM and consider the resignation of the Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

  • Board to consider sale of movable fixed assets, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Related party transactions to be considered, pending audit committee and shareholder approval.
  • EGM draft notice and e-voting schedule to be approved.
  • Resignation of Company Secretary & Compliance Officer to be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RSYSTEMINT] R Systems Fined ₹5,000 Each by BSE, NSE for Delay
item.description:
R Systems International Ltd faced fines of ₹5,000 each from BSE and NSE for delayed submission under Regulation 23(9) of SEBI Listing Regulations for H2 ended December 31, 2025. The delay, attributed to technical issues on the stock exchanges' portal, led to the rejection of the company's waiver application. The Board reaffirmed its commitment to compliance, noting the delay was due to technical issues and directed strengthening of RPT upload processes.

  • R Systems fined ₹5,000 each by BSE and NSE for delayed regulatory filing.
  • Delay attributed to technical issues on stock exchanges' portal.
  • Waiver application rejected due to insufficient supporting evidence.
  • Board reaffirms commitment to compliance, cites technical issues.
  • Company to strengthen RPT upload processes and documentation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R Systems International Limited | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [GICRE] GIC Re: Hitesh Joshi's CMD Charge Extended 3 Months
item.description:
General Insurance Corporation of India (GIC Re) announced the extension of the additional charge of Chairman-cum-Managing Director (CMD) to Shri Hitesh Ramesh Chandra Joshi, ED, GIC Re. The extension is for a period of three months effective from April 1, 2026, or until a regular incumbent assumes charge, or until further orders, whichever is earliest. The Ministry of Finance approved the extension via letter dated May 6, 2026.

  • Hitesh Ramesh Chandra Joshi's CMD charge extended for 3 months.
  • Extension effective from April 1, 2026.
  • Ministry of Finance approved the extension on May 6, 2026.
  • Joshi is currently Executive Director at GIC Re.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: General Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BAJAJ-AUTO] Bajaj Auto FY26 PAT at ₹9,825 Cr, Up 21% YoY; Buyback Approved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bajaj Auto Ltd reported record results for FY26, with volumes exceeding 5 million units, a 10% YoY increase. Revenue reached an all-time high of ₹58,732 crores, up 17% YoY. EBITDA hit ₹12,019 crores (+19% YoY), and Profit After Tax reached ₹9,825 crores (+21% YoY). The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹150 per share and approved a share buyback. A correction was issued for a press release table heading, changing “Q4 FY26” to “Q4 FY25”.

  • FY26 revenue reached a record ₹58,732 crores, up 17% YoY.
  • FY26 Profit After Tax (PAT) surged to ₹9,825 crores, a 21% YoY increase.
  • Board approved a share buyback and a final dividend of ₹150 per share.
  • Free Cash Flow generation exceeded ₹8,000 crores, up 30% YoY.
  • Standalone EBITDA reached ₹12,019 crores, up 19% YoY.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ AUTO LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HEG] HEG Ltd: Re-lodgement of Physical Share Transfer Requests for April 2026
item.description:
HEG Ltd has announced the status of re-lodgement requests for physical share transfers for April 2026, as per SEBI circular. M/s MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited, the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, reported zero requests received, processed, approved, or rejected during the month. The average time taken for processing requests was also zero days.

  • HEG Ltd reports zero re-lodgement requests for physical shares in April 2026.
  • The report is provided by MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited.
  • This disclosure is in compliance with SEBI circular dated January 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HEG LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CANDC] C & C Constructions Appoints Rahul J Garg as Internal Auditor
item.description:
C & C Constructions Ltd has appointed M/s. Rahul J Garg, Chartered Accountants (FRN: 035806N), as the Internal Auditors of the Company for the Financial Year 2026-27. This decision was made based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, which were reviewed and recommended by the Audit Committee and audited by M/s. A S G & Associates, Chartered Accountants.

  • Rahul J Garg appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Appointment based on Audit Committee recommendation.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • A S G & Associates audited the FY26 financial results with unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: C & C Constructions Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [CESC] CESC Ltd Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
CESC Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the continuation of Mr. Paras Kumar Chowdhary as a Non-Executive/Independent Director, subject to member approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Mr. Paras Kumar Chowdhary's directorship continuation approved, subject to AGM approval.
  • Auditor's report with unmodified opinion enclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CESC LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NEWGEN] Newgen Bags ₹14.47 Cr Order for Software & Cloud Services
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Newgen Software Technologies Ltd's UK subsidiary has secured a material order worth £1,125,608 (₹14.47 Cr) from an overseas entity in the United Kingdom. The order encompasses software licenses, cloud services, and implementation services for the customer's enterprise content management platform. The contract is to be executed over 3.5 years. The customer's name is withheld due to confidentiality.

  • Newgen UK secures £1,125,608 order for software and cloud services.
  • The order is from an overseas entity in the United Kingdom.
  • The contract spans 3.5 years and involves enterprise content management solutions.
  • The order value is equivalent to ₹14.47 Crores.
  • Customer's name is withheld due to confidentiality reasons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Newgen Software Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CANDC] C & C Constructions Approves Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
C & C Constructions Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, in a meeting held on May 6, 2026. The results, both standalone and consolidated, were reviewed by the Audit Committee and audited by M/s. A S G & Associates, Chartered Accountants, who issued an unmodified opinion. Additionally, M/s. Rahul J Garg, Chartered Accountants, were appointed as the Internal Auditors for the Financial Year 2026-2027.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved by the board.
  • M/s. A S G & Associates issued an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Rahul J Garg appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Liquidation completed with sale as a going concern for ₹104 Cr.
  • Investments sold for ₹31.00 Crores on August 6, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: C & C Constructions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VISVEN] Vishvprabha Ventures Appoints Isha Mahesh Gavaskar as CS
item.description:
Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd has appointed Mrs. Isha Mahesh Gavaskar as the Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, effective May 6, 2026. This decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, to fill the vacancy created by the resignation of the previous Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. Mrs. Gavaskar is an associate member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India, holding Membership No. ACS-78964, and also holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree.

  • Isha Mahesh Gavaskar appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.
  • Appointment effective from May 6, 2026.
  • Gavaskar is a member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India.
  • Appointment follows the resignation of the previous Company Secretary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishvprabha Ventures Ltd | Category: Management Change
